positive: A minimalist, geometric abstract pattern featuring interwoven cosmic elements and flora. The main subject is a stylized, circular arrangement of celestial bodies and abstract vines, rendered in a negative space style. The color palette is deep indigo, electric cyan, and metallic gold, against an off-white background. The design should have clean, thick lines and a strong, symmetrical composition, suitable for all-over apparel printing. Style: Art Deco meets cosmic minimalism. Lighting: Even, flat studio lighting to emphasize graphic clarity. Composition: Centered and highly scalable.
